kw.name: Set Global Variable
kw.doc: Makes a variable available globally in all tests and suites.

kw.name: Log
kw.doc: Logs the given message with the given level.

test.name: TC-NEG-02 Blank Transfer Amount

kw.name: Should Not Be Empty
kw.arg: Base URL must not be empty. Please set it in config/env.yaml
kw.doc: Verifies that the given item is not empty.

kw.name: Open Browser
kw.doc: Opens a new browser instance to the optional ``url``.

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.name: Ensure User Is Logged In
Login User
Input Text
kw.msg: Keyword 'Capture Page Screenshot' could not be run on failure: Message: invalid session id Stacktrace: chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff79c4c3fa5+14925] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff79c4c4000+14980] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff79c007726] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff79c053083] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff79c08a2d2] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff79c0840d2] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff79c083892] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff79bfd03e5] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff79caa7591+5f7f11] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff79caa1902+5f2282] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff79cac7115+617a95] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff79c4e1dce+3274e] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff79c4ea82c+3b1ac] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff79bfcf188] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff79cc77b58+7c84d8] KERNEL32!BaseThreadInitThunk [0x7ff86a57e957+17] ntdll!RtlUserThreadStart [0x7ff86c0c427c+2c]

kw.name: Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Run Keyword And Return Status
kw.doc: Runs the given keyword with given arguments and returns the status as a Boolean value.

kw.name: Go To
kw.doc: Navigates the current browser window to the provided ``url``.

kw.name: Close All Browsers
kw.doc: Closes all open browsers and resets the browser cache.

test.doc: Submit the transfer form without entering an amount and check for validation
